tasks.title: Add CSS custom properties for night theme
tasks.description: Define night-mode CSS custom properties on body.night-mode for: grass, grass-dark, sky, sidebar background, track colors, cell hover. Use 0.5s CSS transition on all color properties.
acceptance: Night mode variables defined in body.night-mode selector
All themed elements use CSS custom properties (already partially done with var(--grass) etc)

tasks.title: Add ☀️/🌙 toggle button to controls bar
tasks.description: Add a toggle button in the #controls div that switches between ☀️ and 🌙. Clicking toggles body.night-mode class. Save preference to localStorage key 'trainTracks_nightMode'. Restore on page load.

tasks.title: Night sky with stars background
tasks.description: In night mode, the body/main background becomes dark blue (#1A237E to #0D1B2A gradient). Add CSS-generated stars using multiple small radial-gradient dots on the #main background. Stars should be subtle white dots scattered randomly (use a fixed repeating pattern via CSS).
acceptance: Dark blue sky in night mode
Stars don't interfere with grid visibility

tasks.title: Train headlight glow during play
tasks.description: During night mode play, add a radial gradient glow (warm yellow, ~2 cell radius) that follows the train. Implement as an absolutely-positioned div in grid-container with radial-gradient background, positioned at train coordinates. Update position in renderTrainAtProgress().
acceptance: Yellow glow visible around train during night play
Glow only appears in night mode

tasks.title: House windows glow at night
tasks.description: In night mode, house scenery emoji gets a warm yellow CSS glow effect (box-shadow or text-shadow). The glow should be subtle but visible.
acceptance: House emoji has warm yellow glow in night mode

tasks.title: Darker sidebar and grid in night mode
tasks.description: Sidebar background gradient switches to darker tones. Grid background, cell background, cell hover all switch to dark variants. Connection dots remain visible. Track SVGs remain clearly visible.
acceptance: Sidebar is darker in night mode
Grid cells are dark green/teal in night mode
All track pieces remain clearly visible

tasks.title: Smooth transitions between modes
tasks.description: All color changes use CSS transitions (0.5s ease). Toggle should feel smooth, not jarring. Grid, sidebar, background all transition together.
acceptance: No flash or jarring color changes

testingFocus: Toggle day/night repeatedly — no visual glitches
Play train in night mode — headlight follows correctly
Random generate in night mode — all pieces visible
Save/load in night mode — preference persists
Check smoke particles visible in night mode
Check confetti visible in night mode
Verify all existing features still work in both modes
